test.create_query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS codec_fast_{seq_type}_{type}_{codec} (n {type} CODEC({codec})) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS merge_selector_base=1000
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO codec_fast_seq_{type}_{codec} (n) SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_fast_mon_{type}_{codec} (n) SELECT number*512+(intHash64(number)%512) FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_fast_rnd_{type}_{codec} (n) SELECT intHash64(number) FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
OPTIMIZE TABLE codec_fast_{seq_type}_{type}_{codec} FINAL SETTINGS optimize_throw_if_noop = 1
test.query: SELECT count(n) FROM codec_fast_{seq_type}_{type}_{codec} WHERE ignore(n) == 0 LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
